surface_verification.justification: No application runtime surface: this fixes a PostToolUse bloat-recorder hook (shared/scripts/hooks/check_file_size.py) so it no longer records cross-repo file edits into THIS project's per-session bloat marker. The boundary (hook stdin payload -> marker decision) is verified by invoking the real hook as a subprocess against a JSON payload: an out-of-cwd file writes no marker + emits no nudge (RED on the unfixed hook -> GREEN), and an in-cwd oversize file still records + nudges (regression guard). No web/UI/API/store/SSE surface.

behaviors.behavior: A file edited OUTSIDE the project root (cwd) writes NO marker entry into this project's .shipwright/locks/bloat_pending.<sid>.json
behaviors.evidence: test_check_file_size_cross_repo.py::test_out_of_project_edit_writes_no_marker_and_no_nudge PASSED (RED on unfixed recorder, which wrote bloat_pending.S-X.json)

behaviors.behavior: A file edited OUTSIDE the project root emits NO advisory nudge (empty stdout)
An oversize file INSIDE the project root still records a marker entry (by relative path) AND emits the nudge (behavior unchanged by the guard)
